subcodes.first_line: O thou whose luminous countenance is shining with the light of the love of God! Thy face is a world-illumining lamp, and thy heart, enkindled with His remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روشن روی تو رخی که بنور محبت الله افروخته شمع عالم افروز است و دلی که بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @mystical themes, @high station of the true believer, @firmness in the Covenant
